title: satureja alpina subsp. meridionalis
intro: Satureja alpina subsp. meridionalis, also known as the Spanish savory, is a subspecies of perennial herb in the mint family Lamiaceae. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include antimicrobial, anti-inflammatory, and antioxidant effects, making it useful in treating various health issues. The health benefits of Satureja alpina subsp. meridionalis include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve digestion, and alleviate symptoms of respiratory problems such as colds and flu. The plant is often used in herbal preparations, including teas, infusions, and essential oils, which can be consumed or applied topically to harness its medicinal properties.
